_readme: This is the ONLY place your real experience lives. The CV tailor engine selects and reorders items from here for each job — it never invents anything not listed here. Fill this in honestly and as completely as you can; the more detail here, the better the tailored CVs will be.

summary_variants.general: Software engineering student with hands-on project experience in full-stack development, eager to contribute to a fast-moving startup team.
summary_variants.frontend: Frontend-focused software engineering student experienced with modern JavaScript frameworks and responsive UI development.
summary_variants.backend: Backend-focused software engineering student with experience building APIs, working with databases, and writing clean, testable code.

projects.title: Example: Task Management Web App
bullets: Built a full-stack task management app using React and Node.js, used by 30+ classmates during a semester project
Designed a REST API with Express and PostgreSQL for task CRUD operations and user authentication
Deployed the app using free-tier hosting (Render/Vercel) and set up CI with GitHub Actions

projects.title: Example: Personal Portfolio + Blog
bullets: Developed a responsive personal portfolio site using React and Tailwind CSS
Implemented a Markdown-based blog engine with static site generation for fast load times

experience.title: Example: University Coding Club — Contributor
bullets: Contributed to 3 open-source-style club projects, collaborating with a team of 4 using Git branching workflows
Ran a beginner workshop on Git and GitHub for 20+ first-year students
